pages.title: Brewing Infusions
pages.text: The $(item)Kettle$() really shines when used to prepare $(item)Infusions$(), the highest tier of witchcraft magic.

pages.title: Step-by-Step
pages.text: $(8)1.$() Throw the ingredients into a heated, water-filled Kettle. $(l:altar/altar)Altars$(/l) provide power, if needed.$(p)$(8)2.$() Fill the brew into an empty $(item)Glass Bottle$().$(p)$(8)3.$() For infusions, use them in a Rite of Infusion ($(l:circle_magic/infusion/light_infusion)Light$(/l), $(l:circle_magic/infusion/earth_infusion)Earth$(/l), $(l:circle_magic/infusion/infernal_infusion)Infernal$(/l), $(l:circle_magic/infusion/otherwhere_infusion)Otherwhere$(/l)); but remember, death is almost always assured.

pages.description: Crafting ingredient. If drunk, causes the creature to be affected by Poison III potion effect for one minute.
Crafting ingredient. If drunk, causes the creature to be affected by Weakness II potion effect for one minute
Crafting ingredient. If drunk, causes the creature to be affected by Night Vision potion effect for one minute
Crafting ingredient. If drunk, causes the creature to be affected by Wither IV potion effect for 10 seconds.
Infusion ingredient. If drunk, causes the creature to be affected by Poison II potion effect for one minute.
Infusion ingredient. If drunk, causes the creature to be affected by Poison II potion effect for one minute.
Infusion ingredient. If drunk, causes the creature to be affected by Poison II for one minute and Wither III potion effect for 3 minutes.
Infusion ingredient. If drunk, causes the creature to be affected by Poison II potion effect for one minute.

pages.title: Infused Brews
pages.text: Some special Brews require the further infusion of $(l:kettle/infusion_intro#infusion_base)Infused Brew Base$(/l) using $(l:circle_magic/intro)Circle Magic$(/l)

Infused with the proper $(l:circle_magic/infusion/soaring_infusion)Rite of Infusion$(/l). It can be drunk to allow significantly better $(l:creatures/enchanted_broom)Enchanted Broom$(/l) controls, top speed, turning and deceleration for 120 minutes. The benefits stack with those of an $(l:artifacts/familiars/owl)Owl Familiar$(/l). Only a single Infused Brew can be active at a time, with the newer one replacing the old one.

Infused with the proper $(l:circle_magic/infusion/grave_brew_infusion)Rite of Infusion$(/l). It can be drunk to allow a $(l:artifacts/misc/necromantic_stone)Necromantic Stone$(/l) to be used to take control of normal $(item)Undead creatures$(), and not just those raised with a $(l:kettle/kettle_intro#raising)Brew of Raising$(/l). This ability can be used once every 30 seconds.

Additionally, when a Witch under the influence of the Infused Brew of the Grave kills an animal, $(item)Villager$() or another $(item)Player$(), they will regain $(item)Hunger$() and a little life as they feed off their victim.$(p)The brew lasts 120 minutes, and only a single Infused Brew can be active at a time, with the newer one replacing the old one.
